legacy.content:
# Phase 42-01 Plan - Docs Content Pack Report Ingestion
## Goal Let docs users upload new content-pack bundles, generate persisted reports, and load those vectors in Space Explorer.
## Scope - Add report builder utility and report persistence API route. - Add docs page for upload/list/inspect/open flow. - Add Space Explorer query-param loading path for persisted reports. - Add unit tests for reports API.
